title: Citrusy Snappy Slovakian Fish Bowl
description: A refreshing and flavorful brunch dish originating from Slovakia, featuring halal-friendly ingredients and a tangy kick from fish sauce and citrus.
instructions: Rinse the mackerel fillets under cold water and pat dry with paper towels.
Heat a non-stick pan over medium heat and add the fish sauce aekjeot, stirring constantly for 1 minute.
Add the namul blanch season and stir for another minute, then add the mackerel fillets and cook for 3-4 minutes per side, or until cooked through.
Cook the rice noodles according to the package instructions and set aside.
Slice the cooked mackerel fillets into thin strips and place on top of the cooked noodles.
Drizzle with additional fish sauce aekjeot and namul blanch season to taste, and garnish with fresh cilantro leaves, if desired.
